title: Day Counter
description: Day Counter is a fully customizable Minecraft mod that tracks the passage of time in your world and brings it to life. It adds a whole new layer of progression and atmosphere to your gameplay.
body:
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **📝About:**
- Day Counter is a fully customizable Minecraft mod that tracks the passage of time in your world and brings it to life. With features like date system, multiple UI options, Calendar item and block, and configurable day-based events and rewards, it adds a whole new layer of progression and atmosphere to your gameplay. Whether you're running a server or playing solo, Day Counter helps you stay in sync with your world day by day.
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **⚙️Features:**
- Automaticaly counts
- Calendar block
- Calendar item
- Calendar item lore **(V4.0 - V5.0)**
- Commands
- Fully Customizable
- Sound
- In-game overlay UI text **(V3.3 < [Hud Texts mod])**
- Variables for our **Hud Texts** mod
- New Day text display: Title, Subtitle, Chat, Actionbar
- Server & Player day(s)
- Week days **(V3.1 - V3.2)**
- Rewards on Specific day(s) **(From: V4.0)**
- For the crafts please see the images.
- Date system **(From: V5.0)**

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **❗️Required mods:**
- Hud Texts | From V3.4

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **✅Compatible mods:**
[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/858/143/638263226574933812.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hud-texts)

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **⌨️Commands:**
 - **/daycounter add <type> <player> <amount>**
   - With this you can add day(s) to player or server days.

 - **/daycounter set <type> <player>**
   - With this you can set day(s) to player or server days.

 - **/daycounter reset <type> <player>**
   - With this you can reset the player or server days.

 - **/daycounter help**
   - With this you can see the help in the chat.

 - **/daycounter reload**
   - With this you can reload the config file.
  
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
